author: UncleDuck9
title: Amazing hi rez streaming music app
content: Very impressive app that streams your music collection from a NAS or cloud service to your Apple devices. Lots of detailed settings in this app, making it a mature product for seasoned audiophiles. You can even change settings for use with your external DAC, and the addition of an equalizer makes my Boomer heart happy. Built in tags editor is also much appreciated. Delighted with my purchase. Personal wish list to the developers: add a PDF viewer to the file manager or charge an upgrade fee for PDF and ebook viewing. Then I don’t need to leave the app to read something, or juggle with split screens on my device. Not a complaint, however, because this app is already a top performer. Thank you to the developers.

author: Rommel Keith
title: Best Music Player for iOS11
content: I've purchased and tried several music players already and this has the nicest interface out there for both the iPhone X and the iPad Pro. Almost perfect. If I can give a couple suggestions, I wish we can edit tags by group of tracks (by album or by artist) instead of going trough one file at a time. Also, EQ Presets please. Highly recommended player. Congrats to Artem Meleshko.
